member.name: P:Valaiorp.Execution.Models.TaskNode.ExecutedAt
member.summary: Wall-clock time at which the node began executing. Set by ParallelExecutor.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Execution.Models.WorkflowStep.ElseStepId
member.summary: Step to jump to when evaluates false. If null and Condition is false, the workflow terminates at this step.

member.name: P:Valaiorp.Execution.Models.WorkflowStep.LoopStartId
member.summary: ID of the matching loop-start step. Required on loop-end steps so the executor can look up the correct iteration counter.

member.name: T:Valaiorp.Execution.Transactions.TransactionManager
member.summary:
Stateless transaction coordinator. Each call to RollbackAsync / Commit operates on the ExecutionUnit supplied by the caller, so concurrent BotWorker executions never interfere with each other.
Real rollback: tools that implement have their CompensateAsync called in reverse execution order. Tools that don't implement the interface are marked RolledBack in memory only.
